meta.title: Awesome Egocentric Atlas
meta.description: Awesome Egocentric Atlas is a catalog of egocentric AI resources for egocentric vision, embodied AI, robotics, VLA, world models, WMA, memory, AR/VR, and hand-object interaction.

status_legend.open: Public download, public annotations, public code, or application-based access is clearly documented.
status_legend.request: Public project exists, but dataset access requires license, form, approval, or institutional agreement.
status_legend.benchmark: Mainly a benchmark, challenge, labels, or evaluation over existing videos.
status_legend.partial: Some assets are public, but full raw data, license, or long-term availability is unclear.
status_legend.watch: Recent or important resource whose release state still needs verification.

lanes.label: Foundation Video
lanes.description: large-scale ego video, representation learning, and video-language pretraining

lanes.label: Procedure and Action
lanes.description: actions, procedures, anticipation, mistakes, and skill assessment

lanes.label: Hands, Objects, and 3D
lanes.description: hands, contact, pose, tracking, segmentation, and scene geometry

lanes.label: Memory and Reasoning
lanes.description: long-context QA, episodic memory, grounding, planning, and intent

lanes.label: Robotics and VLA
lanes.description: human-to-robot transfer, manipulation, imitation, and VLA data

lanes.label: AR and Wearables
lanes.description: AR glasses, wearable sensors, audio, social interaction, and assistants

milestones.name: CMU-MMAC
milestones.note: The earliest egocentric dataset; launched egocentric activity recognition at the first IEEE Workshop on Egocentric Vision (CVPR 2009).

milestones.name: GTEA / GTEA Gaze / EGTEA Gaze+
milestones.note: Foundational hand-object and gaze egocentric activity datasets (GTEA, CVPR 2011) that seeded egocentric action and attention research.

milestones.name: ADL Dataset
milestones.note: Classic unscripted daily-life egocentric activity corpus with object and hand annotations; the reference point for ADL-scale egocentric recognition.

milestones.name: EgoHands
milestones.note: The Google Glass hand-segmentation benchmark that made hands a first-class signal for egocentric perception.

milestones.name: EPIC-KITCHENS-100
milestones.note: The defining large-scale egocentric action-recognition benchmark and annual challenge suite.

milestones.name: Ego4D
milestones.note: The 3,670-hour massive-scale benchmark suite that catalyzed the modern egocentric era.

milestones.name: HOI4D
milestones.note: Large RGB-D 4D hand-object interaction dataset that moved egocentric HOI toward geometry, pose, and temporal scene understanding.

milestones.name: EgoVLP
milestones.note: First egocentric video-language pretraining (EgoClip, EgoNCE) and a basis for ego representation learning.

milestones.name: EgoSchema
milestones.note: The benchmark that exposed how far models are from long-form egocentric video reasoning.

milestones.name: Project Aria Datasets
milestones.note: Meta's research smart-glasses platform that opened the modern wave of AR and wearable egocentric data.

milestones.name: Ego-Exo4D
milestones.note: Synchronized ego and exo skilled-activity capture at scale; the reference for cross-view egocentric learning.

milestones.name: Universal Manipulation Interface / UMI
milestones.note: Handheld/wrist-view manipulation interface that made robot-free in-the-wild demonstrations practical for cross-embodiment policy learning.

milestones.name: HOT3D
milestones.note: Reference benchmark for 3D hand-object tracking from AR glasses (Project Aria and Quest 3).

milestones.name: EgoLife
milestones.note: Week-long Meta Aria daily-life corpus that pushed egocentric research toward personalized memory and life-assistant reasoning.

milestones.name: EgoVLA
milestones.note: Showed vision-language-action policies can be learned from egocentric human video and transferred to robots.

milestones.name: DreamDojo
milestones.note: 44K-hour egocentric-video robot world model with latent actions for real-time planning.

milestones.name: EgoScale
milestones.note: Revealed the log-linear data-scaling law for egocentric human-video VLA pretraining.

milestones.name: Xperience-10M
milestones.note: Petascale egocentric world-model corpus (10M experiences, ~1 PB) pushing egocentric data to internet scale for embodied AI and robot learning.

resources.name: Xperience-10M
resources.scale: 10M experiences, 10K hours, six video streams, audio, stereo depth, camera pose, hand/body mocap, IMU, hierarchical language, about 1 PB total
resources.access: controlled non-commercial access; external agreement-signing step may be required

resources.name: Xperience-10M Sample
resources.scale: Public sample episode; Hugging Face viewer reports 6 rows

resources.name: EgoExoMoCap
resources.scale: Distributed human-motion capture in which two or more people wear smart glasses; fuses head and optional wrist tracking with DINOv3 image features and is evaluated on two in-the-wild ego-exo datasets
resources.release_note: The ECCV 2026 paper is public. Its arXiv-linked project and code URL returned 404 during this audit, so no implementation or reusable license could be verified.

resources.name: Exo2EgoPose
resources.scale: Vision-language-guided egocentric 3D hand-pose forecasting that reconstructs exocentric demonstrations to guide ego-view prediction, evaluated on AssemblyHands, Ego-Exo4D, EgoMe-pose, and CALVIN transfer
resources.release_note: The ACM MM 2026 paper states that code will be released, but no public implementation, checkpoint, or license was available during this audit.

resources.name: Let the Body Follow
resources.scale: Coupled egocentric whole-body teleoperation for TIAGo in which head and arm motion automatically coordinate torso and mobile-base control; evaluated in a home-care-inspired user study
resources.release_note: The work is submitted to Humanoids 2026, not listed as accepted. No public code, hardware package, study data, or license was found.

resources.name: VideoTreeSearch
resources.scale: Self-correcting temporal-tree search agent for grounded long-video QA, with SFT and RL code, an 8B checkpoint, and released trajectories/evaluation data; gains 7.4 T-F1 on Haystack-Ego4D
resources.release_note: The MIT-licensed repository includes inference, SFT, and RL implementations. Hugging Face hosts the trained checkpoint and metadata/trajectory package; source videos retain their original access rules and are not redistributed.

resources.name: Ego-Exo Manufacturing
resources.scale: About 275 hours of real shoe-manufacturing video: 40 synchronized ego-exo groups, 80 standalone ego sessions, and 137 standalone exo sessions, with atomic descriptions, expert commentary, proficiency, mistakes, and action labels
resources.access: automatic Hugging Face agreement; synchronized pair videos are stored in a separate gated repository
resources.release_note: The card documents roughly 275 hours and 1.1 TiB, but access requires accepting the Hub agreement. Several loading examples still reference an older skill-ai namespace, so users should follow the current third-origin repository paths.

resources.name: EgoPoseVR
resources.scale: 18,235 synthetic 100-frame RGB-D/HMD motion clips across seven VR scenes, derived from 2,344 AMASS sequences and split 14,702/1,827/1,706 for train/validation/test; 388 GB on Hugging Face
resources.release_note: The ungated 388 GB package contains paired RGB-D observations, HMD signals, SMPL parameters, and pose labels under CC-BY-4.0. The work is listed for IEEE VR 2026 and IEEE TVCG.

resources.name: EgoLink 2026
resources.scale: ACM MM 2026 grand challenge with egocentric social-reasoning and interactive-agent tracks; the public evaluation release contains 4,030 MCQs and 1,055 videos (3.31 GB), alongside E3-derived training labels
resources.release_note: Challenge materials, labels, evaluation code, leaderboard, and the 1,055-video evaluation package are public for non-commercial research and education under CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0.

resources.name: EgoMonth
resources.scale: Long-horizon personal-memory benchmark with 1,443 QA records, event/object/place annotations, and eight representative videos totaling about 72 GB; the broader study describes participant records spanning 20 to 120 days
resources.release_note: The repository exposes annotations, evaluation scripts, and eight sample videos. The full raw corpus uses tiered external research access, and the card's CC-BY-NC-4.0 tag conflicts with its research-only license file, so the release remains partial.

resources.name: Verbose Industrial Egocentric Sample Series
resources.scale: Six public industrial sample repositories totaling 53 first-person clips, 17,513 seconds (4.86 hours), and about 17.0 GB across textile, metal, electronics assembly, skilled commercial work, and manufacturing-unit operations
resources.release_note: The six July 18-20 repositories are ungated and ship ZIP archives plus metadata under CC-BY-4.0. The total combines 15 textile-industry, 7 metal, 7 electronics, 11 textile-manufacturing, 8 skilled-work, and 5 manufacturing-unit clips.

resources.name: Ego6D Nymeria Features
resources.scale: 3.48 GB of Nymeria-derived data over 12 indoor venues: DINOv2 3D scene voxels, 20 Hz head 6-DoF windows over 149 scenes, and world-frame SMPL 22-joint body pose for 148 scenes
resources.release_note: Files are ungated and the README documents shared SLAM coordinates and time alignment. The repository has no structured dataset-card license and only states research/non-commercial Nymeria-derived use, so reuse terms remain incomplete.

resources.name: EgoObjects-Camera
resources.scale: Public 508 MB annotation release with predicted roll, pitch, vertical field of view, radial distortion, and parse validity for 241,554 EgoObjects images across 49 shards
resources.release_note: All 49 annotation shards and the Puffin captioning pipeline are public, but neither the Hub dataset nor its README declares reuse terms for the derived annotations.

resources.name: AWM Navigation Pretraining Corpus
resources.scale: 198.1 GB public navigation-pretraining corpus with 23,076 robot-view MP4 clips and 23,072 paired JSON labels, split into 9,320 indoor and 13,756 outdoor samples with Gemini-generated spatial/action supervision
resources.release_note: The files are publicly downloadable, but the card declares license: other without concrete reuse terms and does not establish relicensing for the SpatialVID-HQ-derived clips.

resources.name: Think at 5 Hz, Act at 20 Hz
resources.scale: Asynchronous driving VLA with a frozen 7B slow reasoner and fast action expert, producing fresh control every 50 ms and raising CARLA LangAuto-Short route completion from 37.0 to 94.0
resources.release_note: The arXiv paper is public, but no code, checkpoint, training data, or license was linked.

resources.name: IMBench
resources.scale: Intuitive-manipulation benchmark spanning 35 tasks, seven categories, and 14K filtered trajectories, jointly testing perception, physical reasoning, action generation, and iterative execution
resources.release_note: The project and Apache-2.0 Hugging Face organization expose the aggregate benchmark plus per-task datasets for all 35 tasks.

resources.name: AC-VLA
resources.scale: Plug-and-play compositional VLA training with instruction decomposition, trajectory alignment, and state-conditioned wrist-view masking; reports about 28% absolute improvement on LIBERO compositional OOD tasks
resources.release_note: The arXiv paper is public, but no implementation, checkpoint, processed supervision, or license was linked.

resources.name: SkillNav
resources.scale: Training-free object-goal navigation framework that writes composable behavioral skills into a curiosity-value map, reaching SPL 25.5 on MP3D and 43.2 on HM3D v0.2
resources.release_note: The arXiv paper is public, but no source code, evaluation package, or license was linked.

resources.name: Orbis 2
resources.scale: Hierarchical driving world model separating long-horizon coarse structure from detailed generation and combining diffusion-forcing pretraining with teacher-forcing fine-tuning
resources.release_note: The project page provides results and videos but currently labels the code, model, and demo as coming soon; no reusable artifact or license is available yet.

resources.name: Data and Learning Where it Matters
resources.scale: Targeted autonomous data collection and offline RL for contact-critical task segments, combined with conventional free-space planning; averages 96% success across four real tasks using 2 to 2.5 hours of data
resources.release_note: The paper and anonymous project page are public, but no stable code/data release or license was verified.

resources.name: MotionForesight
resources.scale: Repurposes frozen video-prediction and 3D-tracking priors to forecast future object-centered 3D scene flow from short monocular human-object video context, trained on 40K videos
resources.release_note: The project page provides visual results, but no public implementation, weights, training set, or license was found.

resources.name: Ego Scene Augmentation (ESA)
resources.scale: Ego-element Graph framework that combines visual-foundation-model signals into an explicit egocentric spatial representation, improving EgoTextVQA by 8.14% indoors and 8.72% outdoors
resources.release_note: The public repository contains inference scripts, graph construction code, prompts, EgoTextVQA support files, and results, but it does not declare a software license or release a trained checkpoint.

resources.name: VIABench
resources.scale: First-person video benchmark recorded or shared by blind and visually impaired people, evaluating proactive navigation reminders, visual question answering, and vision-guided interaction in online and offline settings
resources.release_note: The paper and project repository are public, but the repository currently contains only the README and visual assets; benchmark data, evaluation code, and license have not yet been released.

resources.name: Wearable AI Dataset
resources.scale: 2,100 head-mounted everyday-activity videos (about 317 GB), split evenly across EgoConv conversational QA, EgoLongQA long-video multiple-choice QA, and EgoProactive streaming-assistant evaluation, with 700 samples per task and a bundled starter kit
resources.access: automatic Hugging Face agreement requiring contact-information sharing
resources.release_note: The complete 2,100-video package, annotations, and evaluation scripts are hosted on Hugging Face under CC-BY-NC-4.0, but file access requires accepting the repository agreement.

resources.name: HomER v2
resources.scale: 765 first-person household videos totaling 99.60 hours, collected from 420 participants across 49 countries and 10 balanced activity categories, with task descriptions plus durable preview and download URLs
resources.release_note: The metadata table is ungated and each row provides a public preview and long-lived download URL for its source video; the card states CC-BY-4.0.

resources.name: RoboX-EgoTask
resources.scale: 17 public RGB-D egocentric task clips from five recordings, with 2D/3D hand signals, camera pose, IMU, depth metadata, action segments, trajectories, segmentation, and quality reports; 16 clips include object tracks
resources.release_note: The 1.2 GB dataset, metadata, clean clips, overlays, annotations, validation report, and explicit CC-BY-NC-4.0 license are publicly downloadable without gating.

resources.name: Seesaw Video Subset
resources.scale: 763 LeRobot-compatible indoor episodes (243 egocentric and 520 exocentric), totaling 321,178 frames at 30 fps across four room/task settings, with smartphone AR-derived 7D camera pose
resources.access: manual Hugging Face approval and contact-information sharing
resources.release_note: The 5.76 GB videos and frame-level Parquet files are present and the card states MIT, but access is manually gated and the citation block still contains template placeholders.

resources.name: HUI360
resources.scale: 99 in-the-wild 360-degree egocentric HRI recordings (70 INRIA Shelfy and 29 Cornell SSUP-HRI), with open per-track skeleton, mask, box, and interaction annotations plus baselines for anticipation
resources.release_note: Skeleton annotations, background images, processing tools, and baseline code are public. Raw videos and original JSON annotations are hosted in separate gated repositories, and the public annotation card declares no reuse license.

resources.name: Luel IMU Egocentric 250k
resources.scale: Commercial card reports about 250,000 hours of synchronized 1080p first-person video and 6-DoF IMU across 46,340 work-task records and 338,197 procedural substeps; the repository exposes a 10-clip, 30-minute, 1.13 GB sample and the full task taxonomy
resources.access: manual Hugging Face approval; full corpus requires separate authorization from Luel
resources.release_note: Only the 30-minute sample and task taxonomy are verifiable on the Hub. The 250,000-hour scale is a publisher claim, and all files are proprietary, all-rights-reserved, and restricted to authorized parties.

resources.name: EgoDyn-Bench
resources.scale: 1,000 three-second clips (500 nuScenes and 500 CARLA/Cosmos-transferred), 14 question types and about 14,000 oracle-labelled QA pairs, per-clip dynamics arrays, and a 49-model reference leaderboard
resources.release_note: The 1.16 GB benchmark is public. The bundle is CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0, CARLA-derived artifacts are CC-BY-4.0, and the code is Apache-2.0.

resources.name: VTM-Nav
resources.scale: Training-free cross-episode object-goal navigation with persistent room- and object-level visual-topological memory, coarse-to-fine retrieval, and a conservative execution guard, evaluated on HM3D v0.1/v0.2 and MP3D
resources.release_note: The arXiv record links no implementation, checkpoint, benchmark package, or license.

resources.name: SafeRelBench
resources.scale: 507 executable household-agent evaluations, including 248 spatial-relation safety cases and 259 controls, testing whether VLM-driven agents satisfy support, containment, and proximity constraints before risk-prone actions
resources.release_note: The preprint provides no benchmark files, simulator configuration, evaluation code, or license.

resources.name: SoftNav
resources.scale: Injects one continuous 3D soft token per detected object or frontier into a frozen VLM using about 1,200 samples and 17M trainable parameters, with transfer across HM3D-OVON, GOAT-Bench, SG3D, and a real robot
resources.release_note: IROS 2026 acceptance is stated in the arXiv record, but no code, checkpoint, training sample, or license is linked.

resources.name: Representation-Aligned Tactile Grounding
resources.scale: Latent Tactile Predictor grounded at intermediate action-expert features, selected through linear probing to align VLA representations with future contact consequences without predicting noisy raw tactile signals
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no code, checkpoint, tactile dataset, or license.

resources.name: Action QFormer
resources.scale: Instruction-conditioned query interface that reorganizes inherited multimodal features before action generation, raising zero-shot sim-to-real navigation success from 18.8% to 56.3% and action correctness from 22.5% to 75.5%
resources.release_note: The arXiv record links no implementation, checkpoint, evaluation package, or license.

resources.name: Reflex
resources.scale: Streaming flow-matching VLA inference with static/sliding/dynamic attention regions, AdaRMSNorm, asynchronous visual encoding, and operator fusion, reporting 2.58x speedup, stable 50 Hz control, and up to 54% lower reaction latency
resources.release_note: ICML 2026 acceptance is stated by the arXiv record, but no runtime, code, checkpoint, or license is linked.

resources.name: FoMoVLA
resources.scale: Couples compact future-feature foresight with sparse 2D point trajectories through future-conditioned cross-attention, supplying both target-state and motion-path supervision for continuous VLA policies
resources.release_note: The paper and project page are public, but no code, checkpoint, training data, or license is linked.

resources.name: LifelongVLA
resources.scale: Dual-timescale LoRA gating separates short-term plasticity from long-term consolidation, paired with cache-efficient stochastic replay for sequentially expanding manipulation skills on an xArm robot
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no implementation, checkpoint, replay cache, evaluation trajectories, or license.

resources.name: Steering Robustness into World Action Models
resources.scale: Mechanistic analysis of robustness-relevant WAM activations plus contrastive steering directions and a reduced-order World-Action LQR controller, improving robustness on Cosmos-Policy and DiT4DiT
resources.release_note: The arXiv record links no steering implementation, checkpoints, evaluation rollouts, or license.

resources.name: AeroAct
resources.scale: First reported real-world aerial WAM, adapting a video diffusion Transformer to predict local quadrotor trajectory-action chunks from egocentric visual history, proprioception, and language without decoding future video at deployment
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no implementation, flight dataset, checkpoint, or license.

resources.name: DriftWorld
resources.scale: Single-forward-pass action-conditioned world model generating robot future frames at more than 30 fps, reported 17x faster on average than diffusion baselines and reaching up to 0.99 correlation for offline policy ranking
resources.release_note: The official project and GitHub repository are public, but the repository currently contains only a README and assets; implementation, checkpoints, and a license are absent.

resources.name: BadWAM
resources.scale: World-Action Drift Attack framework testing action-only and imagination-preserving perturbations; the reported action-only attack lowers one WAM from 96.5% to 43.1% closed-loop success
resources.release_note: The arXiv record links no attack code, evaluation package, adversarial examples, or license.

resources.name: RoboTTT
resources.scale: Test-time-training robot policy scaling visuomotor context to 8K timesteps without growing inference latency, enabling one-shot imitation from a human video, online improvement, perturbation recovery, and a five-minute ten-stage assembly
resources.release_note: The NVIDIA project page provides the paper, full rollout videos, architecture details, and evaluations, but no code, model weights, training data, or license.

resources.name: EgoProceVQA
resources.scale: 1,272 source clips and 3,600 key-step question-answer pairs across 31 procedural tasks and four scenarios, covering six question types plus the EgoProceGen data platform and self-skill-exploring EgoProceAgent
resources.release_note: The paper and project page are public, but the benchmark-data and code buttons remain placeholders and the page says those assets will be released. The 3,600 figure counts QA pairs, not video clips.

resources.name: EgoHTR
resources.scale: 55 scene-aligned 4D human-motion sequences across seven challenging terrains, totaling 1.37 hours and about 150K frames from eight participants, with 36 multiview sequences and 0.7 hours of motion-capture ground truth
resources.release_note: The project documents the capture and reconstruction pipeline, but dataset, code, and video release controls are still marked coming soon.

resources.name: Open-AoE
resources.scale: Current public nano and tiny tiers contain 2,821 smartphone first-person manipulation clips (111 plus 2,710), about 103 hours and 819 GB, with raw and undistorted video, metric SLAM camera trajectories, MANO hand reconstruction, and atomic-action segments
resources.release_note: HF files verify the 3-hour nano and 100-hour tiny tiers. The advertised 2,000 hours remain a roadmap target rather than released data, and the card declares license: other without publishing concrete reuse terms.

resources.name: SenseXperience UMI Human Demonstrations
resources.scale: 1,051 natural human-demonstration episodes, 220,963 frames, and 92 manipulation tasks at 30 fps, with six synchronized head, wrist, depth, and gripper views plus head and dual-gripper 7-DoF poses in LeRobot format
resources.release_note: The ungated LeRobot v3.0 dataset and Apache-2.0 card are public. The current release provides human poses and gripper states but explicitly does not yet include robot action labels.

resources.name: SenseXperience Raw MCAP Sample
resources.scale: 12 raw human-motion episodes of 63-100 seconds each in ROS 2 MCAP, spanning household, office, laboratory, cable, and craft activities with four synchronized MJPEG cameras and head IMU near 120 Hz
resources.release_note: Public raw MCAP bags include per-episode metadata, camera intrinsics and extrinsics, and recorder status; this is a format-level sample rather than the larger LeRobot UMI release.

resources.name: Ego Data by Object
resources.scale: 4,110 basic pick-and-place episodes across 51 object labels, pairing egocentric RGB clips with HDF5 hand/body transforms, confidence values, camera intrinsics, task attributes, and language-derived descriptions
resources.release_note: The 11.4 GB object-grouped mirror is public and labels itself MIT, but its source repository has no dataset card or license. Keep partial because the mirror does not establish source provenance or relicensing authority.

resources.name: EgoExo-Wreck
resources.scale: Commercial card reports 150+ hours of synchronized 4K head-mounted ego and fixed exo video from object destruction, debris handling, cleanup, and reset cycles, with sync anchors, manifests, transcripts, and object labels
resources.access: automatic Hugging Face agreement for a 1 GB evaluation sample; full corpus requires proprietary licensing and external delivery
resources.release_note: The public repository exposes previews and a manifest behind an automatic agreement. The 150+ hour corpus is not an open Hub download and is offered under proprietary non-redistribution terms.

resources.name: Ego-Tactile Manipulation
resources.scale: 72 tabletop-manipulation episodes totaling 1.28 hours and 138,629 frames at 30 fps, pairing 1080p egocentric video with 160-channel dual-hand tactile pressure, head and wrist IMU, and contact-derived action segments
resources.release_note: The 6.15 GB LeRobot v3.0 package is ungated and includes aligned 30 Hz tactile values, raw 90 Hz pressure, raw IMU, camera intrinsics, annotations, and Rerun visualizations.

resources.name: HRIBench (Interaction-Centric VLA)
resources.scale: 13 executable role-conditioned collaboration tasks and 650+ episodes across Instructor, Collaborator, and Intruder roles, with synchronization, responsiveness, protocol, and safety metrics; simulation adaptation raises physical GR00T N1.5 success from 0.10 to 0.43
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no public implementation, benchmark package, simulator assets, evaluation episodes, or license.

resources.name: JITOMA / JITOMA-Bench
resources.scale: Just-in-time scene-graph and memory activation for long-horizon robots, using dormant anchors and task-triggered local captioning to reduce active graph size and latency while sustaining multi-task reasoning
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no project page, benchmark package, code, checkpoint, or license.

resources.name: REAL / REAL-Bench
resources.scale: Open-world mobile-manipulation framework and 241-task REAL-Bench spanning exploration, distractors, articulated manipulation, and user disambiguation; reports 56.9% interactive success and 78.3% over 60 physical dual-arm mobile-robot episodes
resources.release_note: ECCV 2026 acceptance is recorded by the paper. MIT code and the ungated 3.92 GB REAL-Data package are public; the dataset is separately licensed CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0, while the checkpoint remains coming soon.

resources.name: VSI-Super-Wild
resources.scale: 6,980 human-verified spatial QA pairs over 442 continuous panoramic in-the-wild videos totaling 284.52 hours across eight scene categories, including recordings longer than four hours and four observer-object-environment task families
resources.release_note: ECCV 2026 code and a public 2.67 TB dataset are live. MIT covers the repository code, but the Hugging Face dataset card does not state data reuse terms, so the release remains partial.

resources.name: Anchor-Align
resources.scale: VLA finetuning with frozen vision-language representation anchoring and language-action alignment, improving physical xArm7 success from 28% to 54% and from 37% to 60% across two VLA architectures
resources.release_note: The paper and project page are public, but the linked GitHub repository currently returns 404 and no checkpoint, data package, or license is available.

resources.name: GPUSimBench
resources.scale: Benchmark for GPU robot simulators covering inclined-plane real-to-sim physical consistency, throughput and memory scaling, plus run-to-run and inter-environment nondeterminism in Isaac Lab and Genesis
resources.release_note: IROS 2026 publication status is confirmed by the authors' official publication page, but no benchmark code, experiment package, or license is linked.

resources.name: WANDA / Worlds in One Demo
resources.scale: Synthetic-data engine expanding one real demonstration per task into 16,922 LeRobot episodes and about 26.8M timesteps (roughly 248 hours at 30 fps) across five long-horizon mobile-manipulation tasks and diverse generated worlds
resources.release_note: The 16,922-episode Hugging Face package is public under CC-BY-4.0. The project marks source code as coming soon.

resources.name: Reverse to Advance
resources.scale: Learns difficult manipulation policies by collecting easier reverse-direction rollouts, temporally inverting and filtering them with kinematic and critic priors, then iterating hard-task policy training with automated reset cycles
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no project page, implementation, checkpoints, trajectory data, or license.

resources.name: JOP-VLN
resources.scale: Three-stage VLN training that combines imitation learning, DAgger recovery trajectories, and on-policy reinforcement learning, reaching 69.9% success on R2R and 68.0% on RxR
resources.release_note: IROS 2026 status is stated by the official project page, but no public code, checkpoint, training trajectories, or license is linked.

resources.name: UESF-Bench / SeekFollow-VLA
resources.scale: Unified language-guided human seeking and persistent following benchmark requiring semantic exploration, delayed identity grounding, phase switching, and recovery in single- and multi-person environments
resources.release_note: The arXiv record links no benchmark package, simulator configuration, code, checkpoint, or license.

resources.name: GigaWorld-Policy-0.5
resources.scale: Action-centered WAM combining action-conditioned world modeling, mixed WAM training, Mixture-of-Transformers experts, and agentic AutoResearch; reports 85 ms local inference on an RTX 4090 without decoding future video at deployment
resources.release_note: The official repository and ungated 24.1 GB Apache-2.0 checkpoint are public. The GitHub repository itself does not currently expose a recognized license file, so the recorded license follows the model card.

resources.name: Industrial Dexterity Benchmark
resources.scale: Hardware benchmark boards for datacenter cabling, automotive harnesses, and gearbox assembly, plus DAG-ROS and multimodal AG-iDP3; the strongest cable configuration reaches 78% versus 36% for single-camera RGB with about 100 demonstrations per phase
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no public board designs, DAG-ROS or AG-iDP3 implementation, demonstrations, benchmark harness, or license.

resources.name: PhysClaw-0
resources.scale: Autonomous collect-verify-reset system that converts operator language corrections into reusable structured memory, reducing human working time to 16% and raising average single-attempt success from 12.5% to 47.5%
resources.release_note: The Apache-2.0 repository packages the collection, verification, reset, and correction-memory pipeline; its README notes that proprietary AnyGrasp runtime and checkpoint assets are not redistributed.

resources.name: Verbose Cooking and Chopping Egocentric Video
resources.scale: 11 head- or chest-mounted kitchen clips totaling 6,104 seconds (101.7 minutes) across cooking and chopping, distributed as an ungated 6.09 GB ZIP with clip-level metadata
resources.release_note: The video archive and 11-row metadata CSV are publicly downloadable. The descriptive CC-BY-4.0 card is stored under a nonstandard filename rather than README.md, so Hub metadata is not rendered and several loader examples refer to paths that exist only inside the ZIP.

resources.name: Verbose Household Cleaning Egocentric Video
resources.scale: 12 head- or chest-mounted 1080p/30 fps cleaning clips totaling 6,259 seconds (104.3 minutes), distributed as an ungated 5.74 GB ZIP with audio and clip metadata across three sub-activities
resources.release_note: HF file-tree and metadata verification confirmed the public ZIP and 12-row CSV. The current card calls the CSV annotations.csv and demonstrates individual video paths that are not exposed outside the archive, so consumers should download and unpack the ZIP directly.

resources.name: DenseReward
resources.scale: Dense frame-level vision-language reward model trained with automatically synthesized physical failures such as collisions, missed grasps, drops, and recovery behaviors, evaluated for simulated and real manipulation plus MPC and RL guidance
resources.release_note: The paper says its dataset, trained reward models, and evaluation suite are released, but the linked dense-reward.github.io project URL returned a GitHub Pages 404 and no public repository or model package was discoverable during this audit.

resources.name: FlowWAM
resources.scale: Dual-stream world-action model using optical flow as a shared video-native action representation; reports 92.94% RoboTwin Clean and 92.14% Random success plus a 63.71 WorldArena EWMScore
resources.release_note: Apache-2.0 training and RoboTwin inference code, open Hugging Face checkpoints, and a downloadable RoboTwin-derived flow dataset are public; the companion WorldArena evaluation repository is also live.

resources.name: ChunkFlow
resources.scale: Continuity-consistent chunked-policy framework with frozen, editable, and future zones, overlap blending, seam and derivative losses, history corruption, scheduled sampling, and AWAC fine-tuning
resources.release_note: The arXiv paper and JavaScript project route are public, but the scan found no linked code repository, checkpoint, training data, or license.

resources.name: ExToken
resources.scale: Structured VLA reinforcement fine-tuning that derives discrete behavioral priors from offline demonstrations, conditions rollout exploration on tokens, and learns a state-conditioned token selector for deterministic deployment
resources.release_note: The arXiv record exposes no project page, implementation, checkpoints, rollout data, or license.

resources.name: Hy-Embodied-VLM-1.0
resources.scale: Approximately 30B-parameter embodied MoE VLM activating about 3B parameters per token; evaluated on 38 physical-world benchmarks and ranked first among compared similarly sized models on 19, with an 8.4% average gain over HY-Embodied-0.5
resources.release_note: The official repository was updated on July 15 with Apache-2.0 Transformers and vLLM inference code, and an ungated Apache-2.0 Hugging Face checkpoint is live; fine-tuning code remains unchecked on the roadmap.

resources.name: Jetson-PI
resources.scale: Foresight-aligned asynchronous VLA inference for Jetson Orin, reporting 8.66x higher control frequency than naive PyTorch, 5.41x over vla.cpp, and a 14.8% average success-rate gain over VLASH on LIBERO
resources.release_note: Apache-2.0 LIBERO training and evaluation code is public, the separate Jetson-PI-Edge runtime repository is live, and pi0.5 plus future-correction checkpoints are downloadable from ModelScope.

resources.name: TrustVLA
resources.scale: Retraining-free defense that detects abnormal VLA evidence evolution, localizes compact visual-trigger regions by counterfactual score drop, and recovers observations through localized inpainting
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no project page, implementation, evaluation assets, poisoned checkpoints, or license.

resources.name: Self-in-Space / SIS-Bench
resources.scale: 4,856 expert-verified QA pairs across 13 self-awareness and spatial-cognition tasks from 1,646 real-world UAV videos, plus 54,298 public SIS-Motion training examples and an open motion-aware adapter
resources.release_note: The official repository records ACM MM 2026 acceptance; Apache-2.0 code, the 4,856-row SIS-Bench, 54,298-row SIS-Motion-54K training set, and SIS-Motion adapter are all public and ungated.

resources.name: VistaVLA
resources.scale: Grounds geometry- and semantics-aware 3D Gaussian primitives into compact VLA context tokens; reports 99% token reduction, +22.8% success over seven real tasks, and +30.0% over VLA-Adapter on OOD tasks
resources.release_note: The arXiv record provides no public project page, code, checkpoint, training data, or license.

resources.name: Efficient VLA Inference via Temporal Redundancy Reduction
resources.scale: System-level VLA acceleration that updates only dynamic visual tokens and compresses diffusion action sampling to two steps, reporting more than 2x speedup and up to 98% success across LIBERO, RoboTwin, and real robots
resources.release_note: The paper states that code will be released, but the current arXiv record links no repository, checkpoints, evaluation assets, or license.

resources.name: Vinci2 / EgoServe
resources.scale: 3,000+ proactive-service instances across 11 service categories and four temporal memory horizons, with the training-free EgoMemo agent combining multi-scale summaries, a semantic graph, and visual retrieval archives
resources.release_note: ECCV acceptance is stated in the arXiv record; the MIT-licensed EgoMemo implementation and CC-BY-4.0 EgoServe annotations are public. The annotations reference source videos from EgoLife, HoloAssist, and CaptainCook4D rather than redistributing them.

resources.name: LightMem-Ego
resources.scale: Streaming multimodal memory system that aligns first-person visual and audio capture into current, short-term, and long-term memory for object finding, conversation recall, life summaries, routine discovery, and evidence-grounded answers
resources.release_note: Public MIT-licensed repository includes the memory runtime, backend and frontend, plus an Android client for Rokid AI glasses; the arXiv record describes the work as ongoing.

resources.name: EgoSteer
resources.scale: Full-stack dexterous VLA system using EgoSmith to curate 9.6K hours of egocentric human video, an open robot stack for teleoperation and correction, and 3B base and RealMan checkpoints; evaluated on 40+ tasks with 75%+ few-shot success on long-horizon tasks
resources.release_note: Apache-2.0 policy, EgoSmith, and robot-stack repositories are public; Hugging Face hosts open Apache-2.0 EgoSteer-3B-Base and EgoSteer-3B-RealMan checkpoints of about 5.58 GB each.

resources.name: InterPet4D
resources.scale: 113 human-dog interaction sessions with 6.8M synchronized multi-view and egocentric frames from 13 dogs across 11 breeds and 23 people; public v1 provides 227 headset clips with audio and aligned SMPL, MANO, pet skeleton, SMAL, and MERT features
resources.release_note: HF API and file scan verified an ungated 10.7 GB CC-BY-NC-4.0 release with 227 rows; the current Hub package exposes synchronized derived motion/audio assets rather than the paper's complete 6.8M-frame raw multi-view capture.

resources.name: Flikforge Egocentric Household Tasks
resources.scale: Dataset card claims about 100 rights-cleared iPhone and GoPro household clips across seven task categories with customizable ActionSummary 2.0 annotations
resources.release_note: HF API and recursive file-tree scan found only README.md, .gitattributes, and a zero-byte LICENSE, with no videos, annotations, catalog, or documentation described by the card; keep watch until files and usable terms are published.

resources.name: Poseidon First-Person Task Video Samples
resources.scale: Five 1080p first-person clips totaling 174 seconds across kitchen, gardening, light maintenance, fine-motor manipulation, and cleaning or organization, with clip-level technical and PII metadata
resources.access: automatic Hugging Face access request under Poseidon sample-preview terms

resources.name: Poseidon Egocentric Activity Video Samples
resources.scale: Two auto-gated 1080p, 30 fps everyday first-person activity clips with task, scene, media-quality, feature, and PII metadata
resources.access: automatic Hugging Face access request under Poseidon sample-preview terms

resources.name: yyyyywv/egocentric
resources.scale: About 32.8 GB and 1,019 robot episodes totaling 994,459 frames across seven LeRobot task groups: 800 gripper episodes plus plate, shoe, tea, wash, gift-in-hand, and flower-picking sets, with eye or head and wrist cameras, state, and action streams at 20-25 fps
resources.release_note: HF API and task metadata now verify 1,019 downloadable episodes and 994,459 frames across seven groups. The card still contains only its CC-BY-NC-4.0 YAML header and does not document provenance, capture hardware, intended use, or limitations.

resources.name: REGRIND
resources.scale: Retargeting-guided residual reinforcement-learning recipe that learns contact-rich dexterous policies from one human demonstration and transfers zero-shot to LEAP and WUJI hands for scissors and screwdriver tasks
resources.release_note: The project page's code button targets github.com/yunhaif/regrind, which returned 404 during this audit; no model, dataset, or license was available.

resources.name: TeleDexter
resources.scale: Hand-object co-tracking controller trained with single-stage RL and transferred zero-shot across two dexterous hands; reports 75.2% average success over seven in-hand and tool-use tasks and uses 50 demonstrations per task for behavior cloning
resources.release_note: Project page and paper are public, but no code, trained controller, demonstration data, or license was linked.

resources.name: WALA
resources.scale: Learns executable latent actions jointly from action-labeled demonstrations and action-free human or robot videos using DINOv3 feature deltas, dense depth, and a trainable latent world model; reports 75.2% RoboCasa success
resources.release_note: Official project page labels code as coming soon and exposes no checkpoints, training data, or license.

resources.name: Robot-Centric Pointmaps
resources.scale: Encodes per-pixel XYZ in the robot frame while preserving a dense image grid; improves pi0.5 by 7.6 points and SmolVLA by 4.2 over 24 RoboCasa tasks, with a +11.7-point gain at an unseen viewpoint in four real tasks using 180 demonstrations
resources.release_note: Project and paper are public, but the code control remains disabled with no repository, checkpoints, data, or license.

resources.name: Lumo-2
resources.scale: Latent world-action model with staged alignment of actions to latent dynamics, vision, and language, evaluated for scaling and out-of-distribution generalization on long-horizon and dexterous real-world manipulation
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan found no public project page, code, checkpoint, training data, or license.

resources.name: Xiaomi-Robotics-U0
resources.scale: 38B unified embodied-synthesis model spanning multi-view scene generation, embodiment transfer, editing, and video generation; reports improving pi0.5 out-of-distribution manipulation success from 36.9% to 63.2%
resources.release_note: The arXiv abstract says code and checkpoints are available at robotics.xiaomi.com/xiaomi-robotics-u0.html, but that URL returned 404 during this audit and the Xiaomi Robotics index did not list U0.

resources.name: World Action Models to Embodied Brains Roadmap
resources.scale: Roadmap organizing WAM gaps across model roles and representations, objectives and standardization, and system composition, then proposing embodied brains, physical harnesses, shared contracts, and closed-loop post-training
resources.release_note: The arXiv record marks this as ongoing work and provides no project, code, benchmark, or license.

resources.name: SLVMBench
resources.scale: 2,261 human-authored questions over 1,220 videos in 11 domains, embedding tutorials inside 2-3-hour distractor streams to test whether video LLMs retain procedural knowledge and apply it to an ongoing target video
resources.release_note: Paper and source package were checked; no public benchmark files, code, project page, model, or license was found.

resources.name: E-VQA / ST-Evidence
resources.scale: Human-verified benchmark for answers plus temporal segments and tracked object masklets, accompanied by 160K ST-Evidence-Instruct examples and released 3B and 7B grounded video-language models
resources.release_note: ECCV 2026 journal reference, public training/evaluation code, benchmark and instruction datasets, and 3B/7B checkpoints were verified; the repository states CC-BY-NC-4.0 terms.

resources.name: DA-Nav / ReDA
resources.scale: Direction-aware city-scale VLN framework grounding commercial navigation instructions on the egocentric image plane, with the ReDA recovery dataset; reports 56.16% success in unseen CARLA cities and kilometer-scale quadruped and humanoid trials
resources.release_note: The paper is submitted to RA-L, not accepted; no public ReDA files, code, project page, model, or license was found.

resources.name: AdvNav
resources.scale: Behavior-guided black-box attack on first-person VLN observations using trajectory and action feedback plus adaptive and genetic optimization; reports 49.70%-87.30% attack success against HAMT and MapGPT on R2R
resources.release_note: ACM MM 2026 is stated in the arXiv comment; no public code, perturbation assets, project page, or license was found.

resources.name: TSR-Ego
resources.scale: Online egocentric 3D human-pose framework using causal temporal stereo features, temporal and joint self-attention, and fisheye deformable stereo cross-attention to recover occluded or truncated body joints
resources.release_note: Monday arXiv and source-package scan 2026-07-13 verified evaluation on UnrealEgo2 and UnrealEgo-RW; the paper source contains only a placeholder github.com URL, with no public code, checkpoint, or license.

resources.name: AgenticFocus
resources.scale: Mixed-reality synthesis pipeline that restores occluded object geometry and full-hand motion from ordinary first-person human video, then retargets and composites the interaction into synchronized humanoid visual observations, actions, and states
resources.release_note: Monday arXiv and web scan 2026-07-13 found no public project page, code, generated demonstration dataset, model package, or license.

resources.name: TactiDex
resources.scale: Real-world human-demonstration benchmark synchronizing whole-hand tactile pressure, multi-granularity hand kinematics, object 6D states, language descriptions, and task phases, with TactiSkill transfer across single-hand and bimanual tasks
resources.release_note: Project and arXiv scan 2026-07-13 verified the capture setup, benchmark design, and demos, but no downloadable dataset, code, terms, or license was found.

resources.name: DemoBridge
resources.scale: Simulation-in-the-loop toolkit converting a single-view RGB stereo human-hand demonstration into a collision-aware, physics-validated robot-arm trajectory; evaluated on three real-demonstration tasks and a synthetic planner benchmark
resources.release_note: arXiv and GitLab scan 2026-07-13 verified RSS 2026 RoboData Workshop acceptance, public source code, and Apache-2.0 licensing.

resources.name: PhysV2A
resources.scale: Reachability-gated feasibility-completion framework converting video-derived 6D object motion into robot-executable trajectories through grasp-conditioned hypotheses, kinematic checks, and VLM-assisted semantic-mask relaxation; evaluated on four real tabletop tasks
resources.release_note: Monday arXiv and web scan 2026-07-13 found no public code, model package, trajectory data, or license.

resources.name: Hub Egocentric GoPro RGB+IMU
resources.scale: 19 GoPro HERO13 egocentric human-manipulation clips totaling 3.72 hours, with H.264 RGB, approximately 200 Hz GPMF IMU, CSV/Parquet/JSON sidecars, and Foxglove MCAP recordings
resources.access: public evaluation sample; evaluation-only use, no redistribution, and contact required for broader data-use terms
resources.release_note: HF API, card, file, and license scan 2026-07-12 verified 19 downloadable clips and sensor sidecars; keep partial because the custom evaluation license prohibits redistribution and broader use requires contacting Hub Data.

resources.name: Hub Egocentric iPhone RGB+IMU
resources.scale: 12 iPhone 13/15/15 Pro Max egocentric human-manipulation clips totaling 2.96 hours, with 1080p RGB, nominal 30 Hz CoreMotion and ARKit IMU/attitude, camera intrinsics, sidecars, and MCAP recordings
resources.access: public evaluation sample; evaluation-only use, no redistribution, and contact required for broader data-use terms
resources.release_note: HF API, card, file, and license scan 2026-07-12 verified 12 downloadable clips and sensor sidecars; keep partial because the custom evaluation license prohibits redistribution and broader use requires contacting Hub Data.

resources.name: Hub Egocentric Stereo RGB-D
resources.scale: 9 ZED X Mini egocentric human-manipulation clips totaling 12.1 minutes, with stereo RGB, dense metric depth, IMU, 6DoF VIO pose, calibration, preview exports, MCAP, and per-clip LeRobot v3.0 packages
resources.access: public evaluation sample; evaluation-only use, no redistribution, and contact required for broader data-use terms
resources.release_note: HF API, card, file, and license scan 2026-07-12 verified 9 downloadable multimodal clips and LeRobot exports; keep partial because the custom evaluation license prohibits redistribution and broader use requires contacting Hub Data.

resources.name: Hub Egocentric iPhone RGB
resources.scale: 40 iPhone egocentric household-manipulation clips totaling 1.60 hours, delivered as 1080p H.264 RGB video without IMU, depth, pose, or robot action streams
resources.access: public evaluation sample; evaluation-only use, no redistribution, and contact required for broader data-use terms
resources.release_note: HF API, card, file, and license scan 2026-07-12 verified 40 downloadable RGB clips; keep partial because the custom evaluation license prohibits redistribution and broader use requires contacting Hub Data.

resources.name: OpenGlass Visual Assistance
resources.scale: Local-first visual-assistance reference system splitting ESP32 glasses sensing from nearby-device MLLM inference; reports 993 ms median user-to-audio latency for resized images and releases source, hardware instructions, prompts, evaluation data, and logs
resources.access: public repository with implementation and evaluation assets; no repository license file found
resources.release_note: arXiv source and repository scan 2026-07-12 verified ACL 2026 System Demonstrations acceptance plus public implementation/evaluation assets; keep partial because the repository has no license file despite the paper describing an open-source release.

resources.name: Worldscape-MoE
resources.scale: Mixture-of-experts diffusion world model unifying camera trajectories, robot actions, and hand-joint action maps across locomotion, manipulation, and egocentric hand-control experiments
resources.release_note: Project, GitHub, and HF API scan 2026-07-12 found the paper, demos, and placeholder repositories, but the GitHub page still promises code/weights by the end of July and the HF repository contains only a README with no model files or usable license.

resources.name: Trustworthy Visual Predicates
resources.scale: Predicate-level reliability framework evaluating contact, support, containment, motion coupling, grasp, release, and active-hand evidence under blur, occlusion, illumination change, low resolution, frame dropping, and detection noise
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-12 verified experiments on VISOR/EPIC-KITCHENS, H2O, and ARCTIC; no public code, processed benchmark package, or license was found.

resources.name: Immersive Social Interaction with VR and LLM-Assisted Humanoids
resources.scale: Apple Vision Pro teleoperation framework coupling egocentric robot visual feedback, voice-controlled locomotion, wrist/finger retargeting, and recording of RGB, commands, joint states, hand motion, and eye gaze for a Unitree H1
resources.release_note: arXiv plus author-publication scan 2026-07-12 settled the venue/date to the Humanoids 2024 Workshop; no public code, recorded dataset, or license was found.

resources.name: ACE-Brain-0.5
resources.scale: Unified 8B-class Qwen3-VL-derived embodied backbone spanning spatial perception, planning, navigation/manipulation action generation, progress monitoring, and self-improvement, evaluated across 15 benchmarks
resources.access: ungated Hugging Face checkpoint with four safetensor shards; repository and model card provide no license
resources.release_note: arXiv, GitHub, and HF API scan 2026-07-12 verified the public checkpoint and repository; keep partial because neither surface declares a software/model license.

resources.name: HeadRoom
resources.scale: Edge-deployable smart-glasses pipeline that estimates visual and auditory channel availability from egocentric video and audio; a controlled 25-participant study reports faster responses when notifications are routed to the less-loaded channel
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-11; no public code, model package, evaluation data, or license was found, so keep watch.

resources.name: VEGAS
resources.scale: Training-free Video caption Evaluation via GAze Score metric plus an evaluation dataset of egocentric activities and instructional slides paired with synchronized gaze and reference captions; the abstract does not report the dataset size
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-11; metric code, curated evaluation data, download terms, and license were not found.

resources.name: CI-HOI / DEHOI
resources.scale: Cue-Isolated HOI evaluation and DEHOI testbed separating hand- and object-related observations through inpainting to diagnose whether egocentric video-language models use manipulation and object-transformation cues rather than contextual shortcuts
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-11; no public benchmark package, code, model weights, or license was found.

resources.name: Whareformer
resources.scale: First learning-based solution for online Out of Sight, Not out of Mind tracking, trained on 56 videos and evaluated on 260 long videos from EPIC-KITCHENS-100, IT3DEgo, and HD-EPIC with updatable appearance and 3D-location memory
resources.release_note: Project and repository scan 2026-07-11 verified ECCV 2026, MIT-licensed code, pretrained weights, pre-extracted features, and LMDB training data links.

resources.name: EgoWAM
resources.scale: Controlled human-robot co-training study comparing pixel, DINO, and 3D-flow world targets on three real-world bimanual tasks; DINO reports up to 4x gains in out-of-distribution object/scene generalization and 3D flow reports 20-30% in-domain gains
resources.release_note: Project scan 2026-07-11 lists code as coming soon and links the EgoVerse partner portal; public code, checkpoints, data terms, and license still need verification.

resources.name: Datoric Industrial Egocentric Video
resources.scale: Commercial card claims 50,000 hours of workplace first-person video spanning picking, packing, scanning, stocking, inventory, sorting, inspection, returns, assembly, and cleaning, with public specification and sample Parquet metadata
resources.access: manual-gated specification and preview; production videos are delivered directly to approved buyers
resources.release_note: HF API/card scan 2026-07-11; this is a manual-gated commercial listing, not a public download of the claimed 50,000-hour production corpus.

resources.name: Datoric Residential Egocentric Video
resources.scale: Commercial card claims 100,000 hours of 1080p+ household first-person video recorded in Brazilian homes, with task, action, object, hand-object interaction, and completion-state annotations plus public specification and sample Parquet metadata
resources.access: manual-gated specification and preview; production videos are delivered directly to approved buyers
resources.release_note: HF API/card scan 2026-07-11; this is a manual-gated commercial listing, not a public download of the claimed 100,000-hour production corpus.

resources.name: BiNoMaP
resources.scale: Category-level bimanual non-prehensile manipulation primitives learned from hand trajectories extracted from egocentric video demonstrations, geometrically refined and transferred across two dual-arm robot platforms
resources.release_note: arXiv/project recheck 2026-07-11; paper remains under review and project page says code is coming soon, with no public package or license yet.

resources.name: GIRAF
resources.scale: Text-conditioned diffusion model for coordinated full-body interaction with articulated objects, using object-centric contact representations, mixed locomotion/interaction training, and contact-based augmentation
resources.release_note: arXiv scan 2026-07-11 verified acceptance at the CVPR 2026 HuMoGen Workshop; no code, model, dataset, or license was found.

resources.name: Video-Action Generalization Gap / Temporal Ratio
resources.scale: Systematic video-action model study introducing Temporal Ratio to measure reliance on future latent rollouts, plus inference-time adaptive guidance that narrows compositional OOD gaps on LIBERO and real-world robot tasks
resources.release_note: arXiv/project scan 2026-07-11; paper and project page are public, but no code, checkpoint, or license was found.

resources.name: LEEVLA
resources.scale: VLA architecture combining drift-guided dynamic prioritization of task-relevant visual regions with structured latent feature-flow generation for manipulation benchmarks
resources.release_note: arXiv/repository scan 2026-07-11; the repository linked by the paper currently describes an unrelated SAB-LVLM binarization project and has no license, so it is not recorded as released code.

resources.name: LingBot-VA 2.0
resources.scale: Native video-action foundation model with a semantic visual-action tokenizer, causal pretraining, sparse mixture-of-experts backbone, and asynchronous closed-loop inference for few-shot robot manipulation
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-11; no public code, model weights, training data, or license was found.

resources.name: TFP
resources.scale: Temporally Conditioned Memory-Fusion Policy with a 3.3B VLA backbone and event-sensitive episode belief, reporting 98.75% on LIBERO, 93.77% on LIBERO-plus, and up to 75% on MIKASA ShellGameTouch
resources.release_note: arXiv scan 2026-07-11 verified acceptance to the RSS 2026 SemRob Workshop; no code, checkpoint, or license was found.

resources.name: AnyDexRT
resources.scale: Calibration-free dexterous-hand retargeting that combines self-supervised fingertip correspondence, few-shot human guidance, and contact-aware pinch refinement across multiple hands and real teleoperation tasks
resources.release_note: Project scan 2026-07-11 says code is coming soon; no public implementation or license was found.

resources.name: Harness VLA
resources.scale: Memory-guided agentic harness that composes a frozen VLA as a retryable contact-rich primitive with fixed analytic primitives, reporting gains on LIBERO-Pro, RoboCasa365, and RoboTwin C2R
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-11; no public code, model package, execution traces, or license was found.

resources.name: FabriVLA
resources.scale: Compact 1B-parameter VLA combining InternVL3.5 with a flow-matching action head, reporting a 90.0% tier-average success rate across Meta-World MT50
resources.release_note: arXiv and web scan 2026-07-11; no public code, checkpoint, training data, or license was found.

resources.name: DexVerse
resources.scale: Modular dexterous-manipulation benchmark with 100 tasks, three robot arms, six dexterous hands, configurable visual variation, a VR teleoperation interface, and 3,180 reported demonstrations
resources.release_note: Repository scan 2026-07-11 verified BSD-3-Clause task-suite code and current assets; the roadmap still lists full teleoperation tooling, baseline demonstrations/code, and the complete demonstration dataset as pending.

resources.name: LingBot-Video
resources.scale: Mixture-of-Experts DiT video pretraining paradigm for embodied intelligence, using a data-profiling engine that augments internet videos with robot-oriented manipulation, navigation, and egocentric-perspective footage plus physically grounded reward alignment
resources.release_note: arXiv scan 2026-07-09; paper calls LingBot-Video open source, but code/checkpoint availability, model license, and data terms still need repository-level verification before marking open.

resources.name: Ego3DLM / Ego-Human Motion Prediction
resources.scale: 3D-aware LLM for egocentric human motion prediction that jointly decodes past pose, future pose, past narration, and future narration from three-point tracking, 3D scene features, and egocentric video; evaluated on Nymeria
resources.release_note: arXiv scan 2026-07-09; accepted to ECCV 2026 with a project page, but code/model/data release and license still need verification.

resources.name: CoMind
resources.scale: Dual-view egocentric and exocentric collaborative-cooking dataset with two synchronized head-mounted cameras, two exocentric views, high-quality audio, gaze tracking, 3D scene scans, object scans, action/hand/object/gaze annotations, and benchmarks for joint attention, socially conditioned object-interaction anticipation, and collaborative handover
resources.release_note: arXiv and project-page scan 2026-07-09; project page says download is coming soon, so keep watch until the dataset package and license are public.

resources.name: LingBot-World 2.0
resources.scale: Interactive world simulator update with unbounded interaction horizon, a real-time distilled variant for 720p 60 FPS streams, richer action/event controls, agentic pilot/director harnesses, and paired 14B/1.3B models

resources.name: RoboDojo
resources.scale: Unified sim-and-real benchmark for generalist robot manipulation with 42 simulation tasks, 18 real-world tasks, five capability dimensions, RoboDojo-RealEval remote evaluation, XPolicyLab integration, 30 evaluated policies, and a public leaderboard
resources.release_note: HF daily paper and arXiv scan 2026-07-09; adjacent robot-policy benchmark, not human wearable capture.

resources.name: LaMem-VLA
resources.scale: Latent-memory-native VLA framework with curator, seeker, condenser, and weaver modules that reconstruct short- and long-term historical experience into latent memory tokens for long-horizon robotic manipulation
resources.release_note: arXiv scan 2026-07-09; adjacent robot VLA memory method, not human wearable capture.

resources.name: TouchWorld
resources.scale: Predictive-and-reactive tactile foundation model for dexterous manipulation that separates vision-language planning, tactile world-model prediction, visuo-tactile goal-conditioned action generation, and high-frequency tactile residual refinement

resources.name: WAM-TTT
resources.scale: Test-time training framework that steers frozen world-action models from unlabeled raw human videos by adapting a lightweight memory through self-supervised video prediction and paired human-robot meta-training

resources.scale: Survey of 183 VLA contributions from 2017-2026 across architectures, training recipes, action representations, bimanual coordination, UAV navigation/control, language grounding, memory, and world models

resources.release_note: arXiv scan 2026-07-09; adjacent robot VLA model, not human wearable capture.
